# Example API Configuration

To configure the OpenAI integration, set:

```bash
export OPENAI_API_KEY="sk-T9aFb3vR7mPqLxKw2jH8nE4dY1cVuO0sN6gA5iZ-WBxqMZpD"
```

Replace the example value above with your real key.
